content.en:
After entering the Dou Battle Platform, the figure of the White Blade Dao Ancestor actually shrank rapidly, becoming a meter in size.

This is exactly his Eucharist, the Streamer Eucharist!

It was precisely because of the existence of this holy body that his speed became incomparably fast.

Ye Tian also got on the fighting platform, and without saying a word, he directly opened the Mixed Yuan Holy Body.

Facing an opponent like the White Blade Dao Ancestor, he could not use the power of the Extreme Dao at first, but if he didn't even open the Holy Body, he couldn't beat it at all.

But when Ye Qingtian first displayed the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, he was still recognized by some half-step domain ancestors, and they were extremely shocked.

"This is the Mixed Element Eucharist!!!"

"That's right, it seems to be the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, although the other party is only in the realm of Xiaocheng, but it is indeed the Mixed Yuan Holy Body!"

"Oh my God, someone has actually cultivated into a Mixed Yuan Holy Body, this kind of Holy Body is extremely dangerous, only the legendary Mixed Yuan Holy Fruit can assist in cultivating the Mixed Yuan Holy Body. But the Mixed Yuan Holy Fruit has long been extinct, and the Mixed Yuan Holy Body has also become a legendary Holy Body, and no one has practiced it for a long time, right?"

"That's right, it's been a long time since anyone in the Dark Sanctuary has cultivated the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, but now that the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor has actually cultivated the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, how did he do it?"

"Maybe it's luck, if you're lucky, there's still hope to practice, but that hope is too small, countless geniuses who want to practice into a mixed yuan holy body are all dead!"

......

Countless half-step domain ancestors were shocked that Ye Tian had cultivated into a Mixed Yuan Holy Body, but Ye Tian didn't feel anything, after all, he didn't know much about the Mixed Yuan Holy Body.

But if he knew a little bit about it, he would know how terrifying the Mixed Yuan Holy Body was.

Among the three thousand holy bodies, the mixed element holy body can definitely be ranked among the top ten.

The point is that only after the attainment of the Eucharist can the true power of the Eucharist be brought into play.

For example, those geniuses who are at the top of the list of all things have cultivated the Holy Body to the Dacheng realm.

And Ye Tian's holy body is only a small success, it's not that he is talented, and he doesn't have treasures to assist the cultivation of the holy body, there are many special treasures in the dark holy realm, which can accelerate the cultivation of the holy body, once you get those treasures, it will not be difficult to improve the holy body.

Once the Holy Body is completed, Ye Qingtian's strength will increase by a bit.

----------------

"You have condensed the Mixed Element Holy Body!!!"

The White Blade Dao Ancestor was also extremely shocked.

However, fortunately, Ye Tian's Mixed Yuan Holy Body had only reached the realm of Xiaocheng, so the threat was not very great.

If it was Dacheng, he would directly admit defeat.

"Fight!"

The White-Bladed Dao Ancestor made a move, holding a long knife in his hand, and fought with Ye Tian.

His speed was very fast, far surpassing the average Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

I have to admit that in the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, no one's speed can be faster than the White Blade Dao Ancestor, even if it is the Wind Mountain Lord, if he does not explode with all his strength, the speed is not as good as the White Blade Dao Ancestor.

Of course, Ye Tian could barely keep up with the speed of the White Blade Dao Ancestor.

However, the Dark Extreme Dao Spear was unable to lock onto the body of the White Blade Dao Ancestor, so this forbidden Dao technique was of little use to him.

But Ye Tian's Shadow Thorn ignored the distance, so he could attack the White Blade Dao Ancestor.

Dangdangdang!!!

The two kept fighting each other, almost evenly matched.

At this moment, many people knew that Ye Tian also possessed the near-invincible combat power of the Sixfold One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor level.

A minute passes!

Ten minutes have passed!

Half an hour has passed!

The two of them can hardly tell the winner, if they continue to fight like this, then they can only rely on the Battle Boundary Tower to determine who has the advantage, so as to win.

At this moment of fighting, Ye Tian also knew that he had to exert the power of the Extreme Dao, otherwise he would not be able to defeat the White Blade Dao Ancestor at all.

Rumble!!!!!

With the blessing of the power of the Extreme Dao, Ye Tian once again cast the Shadow Thorn.

The power of this blow directly reached the combat power of the Sevenfold Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and it could be called the attack power of the top Sevenfold Returning One Realm Half-step Domain Ancestor level.

Poof!!!

The Heaven Slaying Spear pierced through the White-Bladed Dao Ancestor and hit him hard with a single blow.

Swish!

The White-Bladed Dao Ancestor used his secret technique, and instantly retreated far away, looking at Ye Tian with a shocked expression.

"The power of the Extreme Dao, you are the inheritor of the Extreme Dao!"

The White Blade Dao Ancestor was shocked.

"What, the power of the Extreme Dao, the inheritor of the Extreme Dao!"

Many onlookers were also shocked.

Extreme Dao inheritors are even rarer than condensing holy bodies, and as long as every Extreme Dao inheritor does not fall, they will definitely be able to become the strongest Dao Ancestor in the future.

Moreover, the Extreme Dao Inheritor can fight beyond the level, and the Extreme Dao Inheritance is almost controlled by the Ten Holy Gates, and even the Holy Land does not necessarily have the Extreme Dao Inheritance.

Moreover, the Extreme Dao Inheritance has too high requirements for talent and qualifications, and it is necessary to follow the Extreme Dao Inheritance at the Dao Ancestor level.

If you are not talented enough, even if you get the Extreme Dao Inheritance, you will not dare to take the Extreme Dao Inheritance, otherwise you will be trapped at the Invincible Dao Ancestor level forever and will not be able to progress.

For example, in the Ten Holy Gates, many demons were also eligible for the Extreme Dao Inheritance, but in the end they gave up one by one.

In this era, among the half-step domain ancestor level, there are only a few who have mastered the Extreme Dao inheritance, and those few are now at the level of the Unified Realm, and they occupy the top few places on the list of the Unified Realm.

The strength of those few people is extremely terrifying, and they can kill ordinary domain ancestors with their hands, and they are truly invincible in the One Realm.

Mingyu Dao Ancestor was also watching the battle, and she was extremely surprised to find that Ye Tian was the inheritor of the Extreme Dao.

"If I had known, I would have pulled him into our holy land at all costs!"

Mingyu Daozu regretted.

However, she didn't know that Ye Tian's talent was so terrifying, otherwise, a domain ancestor from the Zhenyuan Holy Land would also come here with a special clone and discuss with Ye Tian.

In that case, Ye Tian might agree to join the Zhenyuan Holy Land.

But the matter has come to this point, it is useless to regret it, no one would have imagined that Ye Tian's strength and talent would be so terrifying!

Moreover, after this battle, Ye Tian is afraid that he can directly become the first on the list of all things.

The Ten Holy Gates were afraid that they would also notice Ye Tian's existence and directly recruit Ye Tian.

On the fighting platform.

Ye Tian used the power of the Extreme Dao to attack, and after a few moves, he burst the body of the White Blade Dao Ancestor, thus winning the victory.

The White Blade Dao Ancestor was defeated, and 50,000 points fell into Ye Tian's point account.

And at this time, the list of all things was updated, and the name of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor instantly topped the top!
